pref.appearance.editor_cursor_style.help: Caret shape for CodeMirror editors. Both styles use the active editor cursor color.
pref.appearance.editor_dark_color_scheme: Dark palette used by the editor dark/light toggle.
pref.appearance.editor_font_size.help: Font size used by editor text, code highlighting, and rendered previews.
pref.appearance.editor_font_size.label: Editor font size
pref.appearance.editor_light_color_schem: Light palette used by the editor dark/light toggle.
Font size used by Finder/File Explorer rows.
pref.appearance.max_tabs_per_pane.help: Caps open tabs per pane (2-30); the oldest unused tabs auto-close (LRU) when the limit is exceeded (dirty editors are kept).
pref.appearance.max_tabs_per_pane.label: Max tabs per pane
pref.appearance.metadata_badge_pulse_sec: When branch, PR, status, or CI metadata changes, badges like PR and CI flash for this many seconds.
pref.appearance.red_reminder_ms.help: Duration of the red attention pulse for sessions that need input or approval. Set 0 to disable.
pref.appearance.red_reminder_ms.label: Red reminder duration
pref.appearance.tab_width.help: Target width for pane tabs before they wrap to additional rows.
pref.appearance.tab_width.label: Tab width
pref.appearance.terminal_font_size.help: Font size used by xterm.js panes. Values outside the range are clamped.
pref.appearance.terminal_font_size.label: Terminal font size
pref.appearance.terminal_theme.help: xterm.js color palette. Defaults to following the global app theme; a light terminal raises the minimum contrast ratio so dark-tuned agent output stays legible.
pref.appearance.terminal_theme.label: Terminal color theme
pref.appearance.theme.help: Theme for menus, panes, Finder/File Explorer, Preferences, Modified files, and editor defaults.
pref.appearance.theme.label: Global color theme
pref.appearance.ui_font_size.help: Font size for menus, tabs, and compact UI text. Values outside the range are clamped.
pref.appearance.ui_font_size.label: UI font size
pref.appearance.yolo_rotate_ms.help: How often the active YO indicator completes a rotation. Set 0 to disable.
pref.appearance.yolo_rotate_ms.label: Active YO rotation period
pref.editor.autosave.help: Save dirty editor tabs after the delay when the file has not changed on disk.
pref.editor.autosave.label: Editor auto-save
pref.editor.autosave_delay_seconds.help: Delay before dirty editor tabs auto-save. Conflicts ask instead of overwriting.
pref.editor.autosave_delay_seconds.label: Auto save after N seconds
pref.file_explorer.image_open_mode.help: Same-tab reuses one image viewer while browsing. New-tab keeps one image tab per file.
pref.file_explorer.image_open_mode.label: Image open mode
Maximum width and height for hover previews in Finder/File Explorer.
pref.file_explorer.indexed_dirs.help: Directories with a pre-built quick-open index, one path per line. Add a path to index it (same as the Finder right-click); remove a line to un-index it.
pref.file_explorer.indexed_dirs.label: Indexed directories
pref.file_explorer.new_entry_highlight_m: How long newly detected files or directories stay colored in Finder/File Explorer.
pref.file_explorer.quick_access_paths.he: Pinned Finder/File Explorer roots, one path per line.
pref.file_explorer.refresh_ms.help: How often YOLOmux checks changed Finder/File Explorer directories and open files. Client-side jitter avoids synchronized polling.
pref.file_explorer.refresh_ms.label: {name} refresh interval
pref.file_explorer.root_mode.help: Fixed keeps the current root; Sync follows the focused tmux session directory.
pref.file_explorer.root_mode.label: Root mode
pref.general.auto_focus.help: Focus panes and enable hover-open menus after tab switches, layout moves, and hover gestures. Off by default.
pref.general.auto_focus.label: Auto-focus active pane
pref.general.default_layout.help: Preferred starting pane layout for new browser visits.
pref.general.default_layout.label: Default layout
pref.general.default_sessions.help: Preferred tmux sessions to open first, one session name per line.
pref.general.default_sessions.label: Default sessions
pref.general.language.help: Language for the YOLOmux UI. System matches your browser; en-XA is a pseudo-locale for spotting unlocalized text.
pref.general.language.label: UI language
pref.general.reload_on_update.help: When the server ships a newer version, show a "New version available — Reload" banner in this open client. Off by default.
pref.general.reload_on_update.label: Notify on server update
pref.general.reload_on_update_auto.help: When the above is on, reload immediately instead of showing a banner — but only when it is safe (no unsaved editor changes and not mid-typing).
pref.general.reload_on_update_auto.label: Auto-reload on server update
pref.notifications.notify_transitions.he: Session state transitions that may trigger notifications, one transition key per line.
pref.notifications.throttle_seconds.help: Minimum time before repeating the same notification.
pref.notifications.toast_duration_ms.hel: How long in-page notification popups stay visible before auto-closing.
pref.performance.auto_approve_interval_s: How often newly enabled YOLO workers inspect visible tmux prompts.
pref.performance.event_log_refresh_ms.he: How often open YOLO/event-log panes refresh. Client-side jitter avoids synchronized polling.
pref.performance.latency_refresh_ms.help: How often the browser pings the server and updates the latency display. Client-side jitter avoids synchronized polling.
pref.performance.menu_hover_open_delay_m: Delay before File, View, tmux, Tabs, and Help open from hover.
pref.performance.metadata_refresh_ms.hel: How often YOLOmux refreshes branch, PR, cwd, and process metadata. Client-side jitter avoids synchronized polling.
pref.performance.pane_state_refresh_ms.h: How often YOLOmux refreshes YOLO status, prompt state, and tmux session roster. Client-side jitter avoids synchronized polling.
pref.performance.popover_hide_delay_ms.h: Delay before hover popovers close after the pointer leaves.
pref.performance.popover_show_delay_ms.h: Delay before regular hover help and image previews open.
Delay before sending a settled browser resize to tmux.
pref.performance.tab_popover_follow_dela: Shorter delay when moving between tabs after one tab details popup is already open.
pref.performance.tab_popover_show_delay_: Initial delay before a tab details popup opens.
pref.terminal_editor.line_numbers.help: Initial line-number gutter state for newly opened editor tabs.
pref.terminal_editor.line_numbers.label: Default editor line numbers
pref.terminal_editor.scrollback.help: Number of terminal lines kept in browser memory.
pref.terminal_editor.scrollback.label: Terminal scrollback
pref.terminal_editor.word_wrap.help: Initial word-wrap state for newly opened editor tabs.
pref.terminal_editor.word_wrap.label: Default editor word wrap
pref.uploads.filename_template.help: Template for pasted and dropped filenames. Use {date:%Y%m%d}, {seq:03d}, {name}, and {ext}.
pref.uploads.filename_template.label: Upload filename template
pref.uploads.max_bytes.help: Maximum buffered browser upload size. For large files, rsync is faster and avoids buffering the whole upload in memory.
pref.uploads.max_bytes.label: Upload size cap
pref.yoagent.backend.help: Backend used for YO!agent chat. Auto prefers Codex, then Claude (whichever is logged in), else No agent. No agent is local and always available.
pref.yoagent.backend.label: YO!agent backend
pref.yoagent.format.help: Output-format instruction before the user question.
pref.yoagent.format.label: YO!agent answer format
pref.yoagent.intro.help: Instruction prefix before the activity context.
pref.yoagent.intro.label: YO!agent intro
pref.yoagent.invocation.help: CLI runs a local agent binary. API key mode is reserved and falls back safely today.
pref.yoagent.invocation.label: YO!agent invocation
pref.yoagent.system_prompt.help: System prompt used when YO!agent calls a model backend.
pref.yoagent.system_prompt.label: YO!agent system prompt
pref.yolo.dry_run.help: Log matched rules and actions without pressing an approval key.
pref.yolo.dry_run.label: Dry run
pref.yolo.prompt_source.help: Hybrid keeps the visible pane as the trigger and uses recent transcript JSONL only to recover prompt type or command context.
pref.yolo.prompt_source.label: Approval prompt source
pref.yolo.rule_file_path.help: YAML file with ordered first-match YOLO rules.
pref.yolo.rule_file_path.label: Rule file
